# mtncloud_job (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud job: runs a workflow or a task on a schedule against targets. Exactly one of `workflow_id` or `task_id` must be set. Server targets are unsupported on MTN (the /servers API is restricted); use instance or instance-label targets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Run a workflow on a cron schedule.
resource "mtncloud_job" "nightly_maintenance" {
  name                = "nightly-maintenance"
  workflow_id         = mtncloud_workflow.maintenance.id
  schedule_mode       = "schedule"
  execute_schedule_id = mtncloud_execute_schedule.nightly.id
  target_type         = "instance"
  targets             = [123]
}

# Run a single task manually (triggered on demand).
resource "mtncloud_job" "adhoc_restart" {
  name           = "adhoc-restart"
  task_id        = mtncloud_task.deploy.id
  schedule_mode  = "manual"
  target_type    = "instance-label"
  instance_label = "web"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the job.
- `target_type` (String) Execution target type (required by the API): `instance`, `instance-label`, `appliance`.

### Optional

- `custom_config` (String) Custom config passed to a task job.
- `custom_options` (Map of String) Custom option key/values passed to a workflow job.
- `date_time` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for a one-off run (when `schedule_mode = date_time`).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the job is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `execute_schedule_id` (Number) Execute schedule ID (when `schedule_mode = schedule`).
- `instance_label` (String) Instance label to target (when `target_type = instance-label`).
- `labels` (List of String) Labels applied to the job. Merged with the provider's default_labels into `labels_all`.
- `schedule_mode` (String) When the job runs: `manual`, `date_time` (set `date_time`), or `schedule` (set `execute_schedule_id`).
- `targets` (List of Number) Instance IDs to target (when `target_type = instance`).
- `task_id` (Number) ID of the task to run. Mutually exclusive with `workflow_id`.
- `workflow_id` (Number) ID of the workflow to run. Mutually exclusive with `task_id`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the job.
- `labels_all` (List of String) Effective labels: the provider's default_labels merged (union) with `labels`.
